mapper.sql: WITH task_candidates AS ( SELECT i.id AS instance_id, NULL::BIGINT AS host_id, f.frequency FROM db_instance i CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('1m'), ('1h'), ('1d')) AS f(frequency) UNION ALL SELECT 0::BIGINT AS instance_id, h.id AS host_id, '1m' AS frequency FROM host h ), task_rows AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN 'instance' ELSE 'host' END AS "targetType", c.instance_id AS "instanceId", c.host_id AS "hostId", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN i.name ELSE h.name END AS "instanceName", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN dt.label ELSE '主机' END AS "dbType", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN COALESCE(dv.version_name, dv.version_code) ELSE h.os_type END AS "dbVersion", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN i.host ELSE h.ip END AS "host", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN i.port ELSE h.exporter_port END AS "port", c.frequency AS "frequency", CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN i.status ELSE h.status END AS "targetStatus", CASE WHEN lower(CASE WHEN c.host_id IS NULL THEN i.status ELSE h.status END) = 'paused' THEN 'stopped' WHEN l.success = FALSE OR (c.host_id IS NOT NULL AND lower(h.status) = 'abnormal') THEN 'error' ELSE 'running' END AS "status", l.collect_time AS "lastCollectTime", l.duration_ms AS "lastDurationMs", l.metric_count AS "lastMetricCount", l.success AS "lastSuccess", l.error_message AS "lastErrorMessage" FROM task_candidates c LEFT JOIN db_instance i ON c.host_id IS NULL AND i.id = c.instance_id LEFT JOIN database_type dt ON dt.id = i.db_type_id LEFT JOIN database_version dv ON dv.id = i.db_version_id LEFT JOIN host h ON c.host_id IS NOT NULL AND h.id = c.host_id JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT cl.collect_time, cl.duration_ms, cl.metric_count, cl.success, cl.error_message FROM collect_log cl WHERE cl.instance_id = c.instance_id AND cl.host_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.host_id AND cl.frequency = c.frequency ORDER BY cl.collect_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) l ON TRUE )

sql.if: AND (lower(t."instanceName") LIKE '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%' OR lower(t."host") LIKE '%' || lower(#{keyword}) || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT t."instanceId" AS instance_id, t."hostId" AS host_id, t."frequency" AS frequency, t."lastCollectTime" AS last_collect_time, t."lastSuccess" AS last_success, t."lastErrorMessage" AS last_error_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = t."instanceId" AND s.host_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t."hostId" AND s.frequency = t."frequency" AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS total_24h, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = t."instanceId" AND s.host_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t."hostId" AND s.frequency = t."frequency" AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.success = TRUE) AS success_24h FROM task_rows t ORDER BY t."instanceId", t."hostId", t."frequency"

SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = t."instanceId" AND s.host_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t."hostId" AND s.frequency = t."frequency" AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS "total24h", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_log s WHERE s.instance_id = t."instanceId" AND s.host_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t."hostId" AND s.frequency = t."frequency" AND s.collect_time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND s.success = TRUE) AS "success24h" FROM task_rows t WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY t."lastCollectTime" DESC, t."targetType", t."instanceId", t."hostId" LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_rows t WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "total", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."frequency" = '1m') AS "total1m", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."frequency" = '1h') AS "total1h", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."frequency" = '1d') AS "total1d", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."status" = 'running') AS "running", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."status" = 'stopped') AS "stopped", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t."status" = 'error') AS "error" FROM task_rows t WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT id, instance_id, host_id, frequency, collect_time, duration_ms, metric_count, text_count, object_count, success, error_message FROM collect_log
ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
